_note: Tobi's tippable-race registry — the ONLY thing to maintain for 24/7 auto-scoring. Each entry maps a VERIFIED PTO race slug → the app raceId (must match predictions.race_id). Tobi iterates these every run, skips already-published, fetches results (PTO always; MIKA where given, for instant cross-source), and auto-publishes when gated. NEVER guess a PTO slug — verify it returns /results. `genders` only for a single-gender EDITION (default both). `date` (ISO, the race day, from the PTO race page) powers the OVERDUE ALARM: if a race is well past its date with no result, Tobi raises a visible robot_runs flag instead of failing silently. Add Kona once PTO publishes its 2026 slug (currently 404).
